name: Compare workers comp vs lawsuit for noise hearing loss?

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp vs lawsuit for noise hearing loss?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault basics; suit for extras.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Comp for medical/wages no-fault; lawsuit for negligence adds pain damages against employer/third-party.[1] Context: Comp primary, suits if gross negligence.[1]
| Aspect | Workers Comp | Lawsuit |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| Fault | No | Yes |
| Benefits | Medical, disability | Unlimited |
| Time | Faster | Longer | Practical guidance: Start comp, lawyer advises suit potential.[1][7] Comp safer first.

description: Comp no-fault basics; suit for extras.[1]
